meta.title: Sawiyaa | My Profile
meta.description: Edit your profile details and personal photo.

page.title: My Profile
page.subtitle: Keep your details up to date for a smoother care journey.

summary.title: Profile Details
summary.subtitle: Review your information, then edit only when needed.

wallet.title: Wallet Summary
wallet.hint: Refunded session amounts are returned here.

countryCode.label: Country
countryCode.note: Set at registration. Contact support to update.

avatar.title: Profile Photo
avatar.subtitle: Upload, replace, or remove your photo.
avatar.hint: Allowed formats: JPG, PNG, WEBP. Max size: 5MB.

validation.invalidType: Unsupported image format. Use JPG, PNG, or WEBP.

feedback.error: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
feedback.loadError: Failed to load profile data. Please refresh the page.

profile.heading: Profile details
profile.item1: Use your real display name so support can identify your account faster.
profile.item2: Keep language and timezone correct to avoid scheduling confusion.

photo.heading: Profile photo
photo.item1: Use a clear photo to make your account easier to recognize.
photo.item2: You can replace or remove your photo at any time.
